title: Core Perspectives and Issues in Machine Learning
description: A central diagram showing the three main perspectives of ML and the key issues that arise from their intersection.
relationships: The trade-offs and tensions between these perspectives create the central issues in ML, such as the Bias-Variance Tradeoff (Performance vs. Statistical), Overfitting/Underfitting (Performance vs. Statistical), Scalability (Computational vs. Performance), and Dimensionality (Statistical vs. Computational).
